AdapterSetting.Name: Hold WorldEase Consolidations
AdapterSetting.Description: If enabled, any new WorldEase Consolidations will be created in a hold status. All shipments added to the consolidation will be shipped with a closeout mode of Hold until the group is changed to Release.
AdapterSetting.Note: Before making changes, please make sure that all WorldEase groups are closed.

AdapterSetting.Name: Hold WorldEase Consolidations
AdapterSetting.Description: If enabled, any new WorldEase Consolidations will be created in a hold status. All shipments added to the consolidation will be shipped with a closeout mode of Hold until the group is changed to Release.
AdapterSetting.Note: Before making changes, please make sure that all WorldEase groups are closed.

IncoTerm.Name: CIP Carriage and Insurance Paid To

ReturnDeliveryMethod.Name: Carrier will not bill for package until label is scanned

CodReturnMethod.Name: Funds returned by Carrier's default Method

NaftaPreferenceCriterion.Name: Does not Qualify for NAFTA tariff preference

NaftaProducer.Name: No Producer Specified
Exporter same as Producer
Exporter has knowledge of NAFTA tariff preference
Documentation, other than certificate of Origin, of NAFTA tariff Preference
Certificate of Origin for NAFTA tariff Preference

ExchangeMethod.Name: Only exchange for a like item
Allow exchange for an unlike item

BrokerageMethod.Name: Follow standard carrier procedures for customs brokerage
Request carrier-provided customs brokerage services from Switzerland to the EU

DocumentationCharge.Name: Follow standard carrier procedures for displaying charges on documents
Carriage charges should appear on documents that support it
Carriage charges should not appear on documents that support it, unless required by the carrier

InbondCode.Name: Unknown
Warehouse withdrawal for IE
Warehouse withdrawal for T and E
Foreign Trade Zone withdrawal for IE
Foreign Trade Zone withdrawal for T and E
Merchandise not shipped Inbond

ProactiveRecoveryInstruction.Name: No Special Handling Required
Controlled Room Temperature (Temp Range = 15° - 25° C)
Refrigerate (Temp Range = 2°-8° C)
Frozen (Temp Range less than -20° C)
Dry Ice Replenish (Temp Range less than -80° C
Cryo-Liquid Nitrogen dry-vapor (Temp Range less than -150° C)
Return to Shipper
Expedite To Receiver - All Modes Up to and Including Extraction to Courier
Expedite To Receiver - UPS Air Network Only (Next Flight)
Expedite To Receiver - Ground Courier only (No Air)
Hold for Shipper’s Instruction
Hold for Will Call
UPS Operations to Contact UPS Premier Support
Upgrade to Weekend Delivery (if not delivered Friday)
